description: Trains for Northeast Train Pipeline - Weather & Festival Impact Study (Assam/Northeast focus)

long_distance.name: DBRT NDLS RAJDHANI
long_distance.notes: Premium train, already scraped, highly sensitive to delays

long_distance.name: BRAHMPUTRA MAIL
long_distance.notes: Classic route, heavily affected by Brahmaputra floods

long_distance.name: AVADH ASSAM EXP
long_distance.notes: Very long route with many stops

long_distance.name: NORTH EAST EXP
long_distance.notes: Popular daily connector to North India

long_distance.name: DBRG LTT EXPRESS
long_distance.notes: Upper Assam origin, good for festival rush

short_distance_intra_state.name: JAN SHATABDI EX
short_distance_intra_state.notes: Regional Assam train, excellent for local weather impact

short_distance_intra_state.name: GHY SCL EXP
short_distance_intra_state.notes: Intra-Assam + Barak Valley route, passes through hilly/flood-prone areas — highly sensitive to rain, landslides and local disruptions
